summary: Comprehensive testing of AURA V2 features - Graceful Fallbacks, Emotional Overwhelm Mode, Weekly Report, and Goal Breakdown. Backend: 34/34 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new V2 features working correctly with graceful fallbacks.
critical_code_review_comments: Graceful fallback implementation is well-designed - all AI-dependent endpoints now return fallback responses instead of 500 errors
The ai_unavailable flag is consistently returned across all endpoints, allowing frontend to show appropriate messaging
Overwhelm Mode provides empathetic UX with calming messages and focused task list
Weekly Report includes comprehensive stats, narrative, highlights, recommendations, and grade
Goal Breakdown correctly extracts tasks from roadmap when AI is unavailable
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded on startup, test goals created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All V2 features are working correctly. Graceful fallbacks are in place for all AI-dependent endpoints. The Gemini API may still be rate-limited, but the app handles this gracefully with fallback responses. Test files: /app/backend/tests/test_aura_v2_features.py (34 tests for V2 features), /app/backend/tests/test_aura_api.py (original MVP tests)

gemini_api_status.note: Gemini API is rate-limited but all endpoints now gracefully handle this with fallback responses
